ops.title: semsearch: embed Encode context-cancellation lifecycle
ops.description: Review finding E1 (confirmed by runtime probe 2026-07-22, deferred). Wazero only observes Call-context cancellation with WithCloseOnContextDone, which the embed runtime omits; an expired Encode keeps running while holding the engine mutex (a probe: 8192-text encode ignored a 1ms deadline; a later request waited 341ms on the mutex despite an expired context), and loadTimeout likewise can't interrupt em_load_model. Fix: enable termination checks, treat a cancellation as instance-fatal, rebuild/reload the resident module before reuse, and make mutex admission context-aware. Larger lifecycle change than the E2/E3/E4 hygiene fixes already shipped.

ops.text: A cancelled/expired Encode releases the mutex promptly and does not wedge later requests; loadTimeout can interrupt model load
